interactions.summary: Now we go to the Israelis, Jerusalem, the capital. It's a mixed system. Meaning it's both democracy as well as a theocracy. And it's good in that the Israelis are very creative. But the fundamental weakness is the division within society where Tel Aviv and Jerusalem don't get along. Okay? So that is the political system of Israel.
